verse1.chords: A    C          D     A       C       D    A

verse1.lyrics: Now, don't just walk away, pretending everything's okay
And you don't care about me

verse1.chords: A C         D         A       C        D

verse1.lyrics: And I know it's just no use, when all your lies
Become your truths and I don't care yeah yeah yeah

chorus.lyrics: Could you look me in the eye, and tell me that you're happy now?
Would you tell it to my face, or have I been erased,

verse2.chords: A        C         D       A        C         D      A

verse2.lyrics: You took all there was to take, and left me with an empty plate,
And you don't care about it, yeah

verse2.chords: A   C      D       A         C       D        A

verse2.lyrics: And I'm giving up this game, and leaving you with all the blame
'Cause I don't care, yeah yeah yeah

bridge.lyrics: Are you happy now?   Are you happy now? Yeah-Yeah  Yeah
Do you really have everything you want?
You can never give something you ain't got
You can't run away from yourself, yeah yeah

ending.lyrics: Would you look me in the eye?
Don't you look me in the eye?
I've had all that I can take. I'm not about to break,
